title: feat: Implement `transformItems` API
body:
This adds support for the `transformItems` option on widgets. ## How The implementation was made at the connector level for the following reasons: - The transformation takes place before the rendering - Leverage the `transformItems` API in all flavors (since the connectors are/will be shared across InstantSearch libraries) ## How to review Each commit is a widget implementation. Click on the commit and add your review there. [See commits →](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/pull/3042/commits) ## Supported widgets - [x] [BreadCrumb](https://community.algolia.com/instantsearch.js/v2/widgets/breadcrumb.html) - [x] [CurrentRefinedValues](https://community.algolia.com/instantsearch.js/v2/widgets/currentRefinedValues.html) - [x] [GeoSearch](https://community.algolia.com/instantsearch.js/v2/widgets/geoSearch.html) - [x] [HierarchicalMenu](https://community.algolia.com/instantsearch.js/v2/widgets/hierarchicalMenu.html) - [x] [Hits](https://community.algolia.com/instantsearch.js/v2/widgets/hits.html) - [x] [HitsPerPageSelector](https://community.algolia.com/instantsearch.js/v2/widgets/hitsPerPageSelector.html) - [x] [InfiniteHits](https://community.algolia.com/instantsearch.js/v2/widgets/infiniteHits.html) - [x] [Menu](https://community.algolia.com/instantsearch.js/v2/widgets/menu.html) - [x] [MenuSelect](https://community.algolia.com/instantsearch.js/v2/widgets/menuSelect.html) - [x] [NumericRefinementList](https://community.algolia.com/instantsearch.js/v2/widgets/numericRefinementList.html) - [x] [NumericSelector](https://community.algolia.com/instantsearch.js/v2/widgets/numericSelector.html) - [x] [RefinementList](https://community.algolia.com/instantsearch.js/v2/widgets/refinementList.html) - [x] [SortBySelector](https://community.algolia.com/instantsearch.js/v2/widgets/sortBySelector.html) These widgets have been selected based on whether they contain items and based on the current React InstantSearch API. Let me know if this list should be updated. [See all InstantSearch.js widgets →](https://community.algolia.com/instantsearch.js/v2/widgets.html)
React InstantSearch widgets implementing transformItems - Breadcrumb - ClearRefinements - CurrentRefinements - HierarchicalMenu - HitsPerPage - Menu - MenuSelect - NumericMenu - RefinementList - SortBy
--- Closes #2949
